subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and His chosen ones! By the truth of God, verily the suns have been darkened and the stars scattered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله و اولیائه تالله الحق ان الشموس قد کورت و ان النجوم انتثرت و ان
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
